narrative:
North Canton 4-A (precinct in Stark County) has 972 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.7 percentage points.
